content_of_post_to_comment:
I spent weeks researching how social media affects attention spans and made a documentary summarizing the evidence and different viewpoints. I thought some people here might find it useful. views are extremely appreciable

https://youtu.be/lNgqX0hzzGA
comment: A documentary format is a good way to tackle this topic because the attention span debate gets reduced to "phones are bad" way too often. I'm curious if you looked at differences between passive scrolling and intentional use, since a lot of research seems to point more toward the type of engagement rather than just screen time alone.
